 275: //
 276: // input-sections.cc
 277: //
 278: 
 279: // InputSection represents an input section in an input file. InputSection
 280: // is always split into one or more Subsections. If an input section is not
 281: // splittable, we still create a subsection and let it cover the entire input
 282: // section.
 283: template <typename E>
 284: class InputSection {
 285: public:
 286:   InputSection(Context<E> &ctx, ObjectFile<E> &file, const MachSection<E> &hdr,
 287:                u32 secidx);
 288:   void parse_relocations(Context<E> &ctx);
 289: 
 290:   ObjectFile<E> &file;
 291:   const MachSection<E> &hdr;
 292:   u32 secidx = 0;
 293:   OutputSection<E> &osec;
 294:   std::string_view contents;
 295:   std::vector<Symbol<E> *> syms;
 296:   std::vector<Relocation<E>> rels;
 297: };
 298: 
 299: template <typename E>
 300: std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &out, const InputSection<E> &sec);
 301: 
 302: // Subsection represents a region in an InputSection.
 303: template <typename E>
 304: class Subsection {
 305: public:
 306:   u64 get_addr(Context<E> &ctx) const {
 307:     return isec->osec.hdr.addr + output_offset;
 308:   }
 309: 
 310:   std::string_view get_contents() {
 311:     assert(isec->hdr.type != S_ZEROFILL);
 312:     return isec->contents.substr(input_addr - isec->hdr.addr, input_size);
 313:   }
 314: 
 315:   std::span<UnwindRecord<E>> get_unwind_records() {
 316:     return std::span<UnwindRecord<E>>(isec->file.unwind_records)
 317:       .subspan(unwind_offset, nunwind);
 318:   }
 319: 
 320:   std::span<Relocation<E>> get_rels() const {
 321:     return std::span<Relocation<E>>(isec->rels).subspan(rel_offset, nrels);
 322:   }
 323: 
 324:   void scan_relocations(Context<E> &ctx);
 325:   void apply_reloc(Context<E> &ctx, u8 *buf);
 326: 
 327:   union {
 328:     InputSection<E> *isec = nullptr;
 329:     Subsection<E> *replacer; // used only if `is_replaced` is true
 330:   };
 331: 
 332:   u32 input_addr = 0;
 333:   u32 input_size = 0;
 334:   u32 output_offset = (u32)-1;
 335:   u32 rel_offset = 0;
 336:   u32 nrels = 0;
 337:   u32 unwind_offset = 0;
 338:   u32 nunwind = 0;
 339: 
 340:   Atomic<u8> p2align = 0;
 341:   Atomic<bool> is_alive = true;
 342:   bool added_to_osec : 1 = false;
 343:   bool is_replaced : 1 = false;
 344:   bool has_compact_unwind : 1 = false;
 345: };
 346: 
 347: template <typename E>
 348: std::vector<Relocation<E>>
 349: read_relocations(Context<E> &ctx, ObjectFile<E> &file, const MachSection<E> &hdr);
 350: 
 351: //
 352: // Symbol
 353: //
 354: 
 355: enum {
 356:   NEEDS_GOT              = 1 << 0,
 357:   NEEDS_STUB             = 1 << 1,
 358:   NEEDS_THREAD_PTR       = 1 << 2,
 359:   NEEDS_RANGE_EXTN_THUNK = 1 << 3,
 360: };
 361: 
 362: enum {
 363:   SCOPE_LOCAL,  // input file visibility
 364:   SCOPE_MODULE, // output file visibility (non-exported symbol)
 365:   SCOPE_GLOBAL, // global visibility (exported symbol)
 366: };
 367: 
 368: template <typename E>
 369: struct Symbol {
 370:   Symbol() = default;
 371:   Symbol(std::string_view name) : name(name) {}
 372:   Symbol(const Symbol<E> &other) : name(other.name) {}
 373: 
 374:   u64 get_addr(Context<E> &ctx) const {
 375:     if (stub_idx != -1)
 376:       return ctx.stubs.hdr.addr + stub_idx * E::stub_size;
 377:     if (subsec) {
 378:       assert(subsec->is_alive);
 379:       return subsec->get_addr(ctx) + value;
 380:     }
 381:     return value;
 382:   }
 383: 
 384:   u64 get_got_addr(Context<E> &ctx) const {
 385:     assert(got_idx != -1);
 386:     return ctx.got.hdr.addr + got_idx * sizeof(Word<E>);
 387:   }
 388: 
 389:   u64 get_tlv_addr(Context<E> &ctx) const {
 390:     assert(tlv_idx != -1);
 391:     return ctx.thread_ptrs.hdr.addr + tlv_idx * sizeof(Word<E>);
 392:   }
 393: 
 394:   bool has_stub() const { return stub_idx != -1; }
 395:   bool has_got() const { return got_idx != -1; }
 396:   bool has_tlv() const { return tlv_idx != -1; }
 397: 
 398:   std::string_view name;
 399:   InputFile<E> *file = nullptr;
 400:   Subsection<E> *subsec = nullptr;
 401:   u64 value = 0;
 402: 
 403:   i32 stub_idx = -1;
 404:   i32 got_idx = -1;
 405:   i32 tlv_idx = -1;
 406: 
 407:   tbb::spin_mutex mu;
 408: 
 409:   Atomic<u8> flags = 0;
 410: 
 411:   u8 visibility : 2 = SCOPE_LOCAL;
 412:   bool is_common : 1 = false;
 413:   bool is_weak : 1 = false;
 414:   bool is_abs : 1 = false;
 415:   bool is_tlv : 1 = false;
 416:   bool no_dead_strip : 1 = false;
 417: 
 418:   // `is_exported` is true if this symbol is exported from this Mach-O
 419:   // file. `is_imported` is true if this symbol is resolved by the dynamic
 420:   // loader at load time.
 421:   //
 422:   // Note that if `-flat_namespace` is given (which is rare), both are
 423:   // true. In that case, dynamic symbols are resolved in the same
 424:   // semantics as ELF's.
 425:   bool is_imported : 1 = false;
 426:   bool is_exported : 1 = false;
 427: 
 428:   union {
 429:     // For range extension thunks. Used by OutputSection::compute_size().
 430:     struct {
 431:       i16 thunk_idx = -1;
 432:       i16 thunk_sym_idx = -1;
 433:     };
 434: 
 435:     // For chained fixups. Used by ChainedFixupsSection.
 436:     i32 fixup_ordinal;
 437:   };
 438: 
 439:   // For symtab
 440:   i32 output_symtab_idx = -1;
 441: };
 442: 
 443: template <typename E>
 444: std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &out, const Symbol<E> &sym);
 445: 
 446: // This operator defines a total order over symbols. This is used to
 447: // make the output deterministic.
 448: template <typename E>
 449: inline bool operator<(const Symbol<E> &a, const Symbol<E> &b) {
 450:   return std::tuple{a.file->priority, a.value} <
 451:          std::tuple{b.file->priority, b.value};
 452: }
 453: 
 454: //
 455: // output-chunks.cc
 456: //
 457: 
 458: template <typename E>
 459: class OutputSegment {
 460: public:
 461:   static OutputSegment<E> *
 462:   get_instance(Context<E> &ctx, std::string_view name);
 463: 
 464:   void set_offset(Context<E> &ctx, i64 fileoff, u64 vmaddr);
 465: 
 466:   SegmentCommand<E> cmd = {};
 467:   i32 seg_idx = -1;
 468:   std::vector<Chunk<E> *> chunks;
 469: 
 470: private:
 471:   void set_offset_regular(Context<E> &ctx, i64 fileoff, u64 vmaddr);
 472:   void set_offset_linkedit(Context<E> &ctx, i64 fileoff, u64 vmaddr);
 473: 
 474:   OutputSegment(std::string_view name);
 475: };
 476: 
 477: template <typename E>
 478: class Chunk {
 479: public:
 480:   Chunk(Context<E> &ctx, std::string_view segname, std::string_view sectname) {
 481:     ctx.chunks.push_back(this);
 482:     hdr.set_segname(segname);
 483:     hdr.set_sectname(sectname);
 484:     seg = OutputSegment<E>::get_instance(ctx, segname);
 485:   }
 486: 
 487:   virtual ~Chunk() = default;
 488:   virtual void compute_size(Context<E> &ctx) {}
 489:   virtual void copy_buf(Context<E> &ctx) {}
 490: 
 491:   OutputSection<E> *to_osec() const  {
 492:     if (is_output_section)
 493:       return (OutputSection<E> *)this;
 494:     return nullptr;
 495:   }
 496: 
 497:   MachSection<E> hdr = {};
 498:   u32 sect_idx = 0;
 499:   bool is_hidden = false;
 500:   OutputSegment<E> *seg = nullptr;
 501: 
 502: protected:
 503:   bool is_output_section = false;
 504: };
 505: 
 506: template <typename E>
 507: std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &out, const Chunk<E> &chunk);
 508: 
 509: template <typename E>
 510: class OutputMachHeader : public Chunk<E> {
 511: public:
 512:   OutputMachHeader(Context<E> &ctx)
 513:     : Chunk<E>(ctx, "__TEXT", "__mach_header") {
 514:     this->is_hidden = true;
 515:   }
 516: 
 517:   void compute_size(Context<E> &ctx) override;
 518:   void copy_buf(Context<E> &ctx) override;
 519: };
 520: 
 521: template <typename E>
 522: class RangeExtensionThunk {};
 523: 
 524: template <typename E> requires is_arm<E>
 525: class RangeExtensionThunk<E> {
 526: public:
 527:   RangeExtensionThunk(OutputSection<E> &osec, i64 thunk_idx, i64 offset)
 528:     : output_section(osec), thunk_idx(thunk_idx), offset(offset) {}
 529: 
 530:   i64 size() const {
 531:     return symbols.size() * ENTRY_SIZE;
 532:   }
 533: 
 534:   u64 get_addr(i64 idx) const {
 535:     return output_section.hdr.addr + offset + idx * ENTRY_SIZE;
 536:   }
 537: 
 538:   void copy_buf(Context<E> &ctx);
 539: 
 540:   static constexpr i64 ALIGNMENT = 16;
 541:   static constexpr i64 ENTRY_SIZE = 12;
 542: 
 543:   OutputSection<E> &output_section;
 544:   i64 thunk_idx;
 545:   i64 offset;
 546:   std::mutex mu;
 547:   std::vector<Symbol<E> *> symbols;
 548: };
 549: 
 550: template <typename E>
 551: class OutputSection : public Chunk<E> {
 552: public:
 553:   static OutputSection<E> *
 554:   get_instance(Context<E> &ctx, std::string_view segname,
 555:                std::string_view sectname);
 556: 
 557:   OutputSection(Context<E> &ctx, std::string_view segname,
 558:                 std::string_view sectname)
 559:     : Chunk<E>(ctx, segname, sectname) {
 560:     this->is_output_section = true;
 561:   }
 562: 
 563:   void compute_size(Context<E> &ctx) override;
 564:   void copy_buf(Context<E> &ctx) override;
 565: 
 566:   void add_subsec(Subsection<E> *subsec) {
 567:     members.push_back(subsec);
 568:     this->hdr.p2align = std::max<u32>(this->hdr.p2align, subsec->p2align);
 569:     this->hdr.attr |= subsec->isec->hdr.attr;
 570:     this->hdr.type = subsec->isec->hdr.type;
 571: 
 572:     assert(!subsec->added_to_osec);
 573:     subsec->added_to_osec = true;
 574:   }
 575: 
 576:   std::vector<Subsection<E> *> members;
 577:   std::vector<std::unique_ptr<RangeExtensionThunk<E>>> thunks;
 578: };
 579: 
 580: template <typename E>
 581: class RebaseSection : public Chunk<E> {
 582: public:
 583:   RebaseSection(Context<E> &ctx)
 584:     : Chunk<E>(ctx, "__LINKEDIT", "__rebase") {
 585:     this->is_hidden = true;
 586:   }

 588:   void compute_size(Context<E> &ctx) override;
 589:   void copy_buf(Context<E> &ctx) override;
 590: 
 591:   std::vector<u8> contents;
 592: };

 626: class ExportEncoder {
 627: public:
 628:   i64 finish();
 629: 
 630:   struct Entry {
 631:     std::string_view name;
 632:     u32 flags;
 633:     u64 addr;
 634:   };
 635: 
 636:   struct TrieNode {
 637:     std::string_view prefix;
 638:     std::vector<std::unique_ptr<TrieNode>> children;
 639:     u64 addr = 0;
 640:     u32 flags = 0;
 641:     u32 offset = -1;
 642:     bool is_leaf = false;
 643:   };
 644: 
 645:   void construct_trie(TrieNode &node, std::span<Entry> entries, i64 len,
 646:                       tbb::task_group *tg, i64 grain_size, bool divide);
 647: 
 648:   static i64 set_offset(TrieNode &node, i64 offset);
 649:   void write_trie(u8 *buf, TrieNode &node);
 650: 
 651:   TrieNode root;
 652:   std::vector<Entry> entries;
 653: };

 992: struct VersionTriple {
 993:   VersionTriple &operator=(const VersionTriple &) = default;
 994:   auto operator<=>(const VersionTriple &) const = default;
 995: 
 996:   i64 encode() const { return (major << 16) | (minor << 8) | patch; }
 997: 
 998:   i64 major = 0;
 999:   i64 minor = 0;
1000:   i64 patch = 0;
1001: };
1002: 
1003: template <typename E>
1004: VersionTriple parse_version(Context<E> &ctx, std::string_view arg);
1005:

1007: std::vector<std::string> parse_nonpositional_args(Context<E> &ctx);

1037: enum UuidKind { UUID_NONE, UUID_HASH, UUID_RANDOM };
1038: 
1039: struct AddEmptySectionOption {

1041:   std::string_view sectname;
1042: };
1043:

1048: };

1056: struct ReaderContext {
1057:   bool all_load = false;
1058:   bool needed = false;
1059:   bool hidden = false;
1060:   bool weak = false;
1061:   bool reexport = false;
1062:   bool implicit = false;
1063: };
1064: 
1065: template <typename E>
1066: struct Context {
1067:   Context() {
1068:     text_seg = OutputSegment<E>::get_instance(*this, "__TEXT");
1069:     data_const_seg = OutputSegment<E>::get_instance(*this, "__DATA_CONST");
1070:     data_seg = OutputSegment<E>::get_instance(*this, "__DATA");
1071:     linkedit_seg = OutputSegment<E>::get_instance(*this, "__LINKEDIT");
1072: 
1073:     text = OutputSection<E>::get_instance(*this, "__TEXT", "__text");
1074:     data = OutputSection<E>::get_instance(*this, "__DATA", "__data");
1075:     bss = OutputSection<E>::get_instance(*this, "__DATA", "__bss");
1076:     common = OutputSection<E>::get_instance(*this, "__DATA", "__common");
1077: 
1078:     bss->hdr.type = S_ZEROFILL;
1079:     common->hdr.type = S_ZEROFILL;
1080: 
1081:     dyld_stub_binder = get_symbol(*this, "dyld_stub_binder");
1082:     _objc_msgSend = get_symbol(*this, "_objc_msgSend");
1083:     __mh_execute_header = get_symbol(*this, "__mh_execute_header");
1084:     __dyld_private = get_symbol(*this, "__dyld_private");
1085:     __mh_dylib_header = get_symbol(*this, "__mh_dylib_header");
1086:     __mh_bundle_header = get_symbol(*this, "__mh_bundle_header");
1087:     ___dso_handle = get_symbol(*this, "___dso_handle");
1088:   }
1089: 
1090:   Context(const Context<E> &) = delete;
1091: 
1092:   void checkpoint() {
1093:     if (has_error) {
1094:       cleanup();
1095:       _exit(1);
1096:     }
1097:   }
1098: 
1099:   // Command-line arguments
1100:   struct {
1101:     MultiGlob exported_symbols_list;
1102:     MultiGlob unexported_symbols_list;
1103:     Symbol<E> *entry = nullptr;
1104:     UuidKind uuid = UUID_HASH;
1105:     VersionTriple compatibility_version;
1106:     VersionTriple current_version;
1107:     VersionTriple platform_min_version;
1108:     VersionTriple platform_sdk_version;
1109:     bool ObjC = false;
1110:     bool S = false;
1111:     bool adhoc_codesign = is_arm<E>;
1112:     bool application_extension = false;
1113:     bool bind_at_load = false;
1114:     bool color_diagnostics = false;
1115:     bool data_in_code_info = true;
1116:     bool dead_strip = false;
1117:     bool dead_strip_dylibs = false;
1118:     bool deduplicate = true;
1119:     bool demangle = true;
1120:     bool dynamic = true;
1121:     bool export_dynamic = false;
1122:     bool fatal_warnings = false;
1123:     bool fixup_chains = false;
1124:     bool flat_namespace = false;
1125:     bool function_starts = true;
1126:     bool implicit_dylibs = true;
1127:     bool init_offsets = false;
1128:     bool mark_dead_strippable_dylib = false;
1129:     bool noinhibit_exec = false;
1130:     bool perf = false;
1131:     bool print_dependencies = false;
1132:     bool quick_exit = true;
1133:     bool search_paths_first = true;
1134:     bool stats = false;
1135:     bool suppress_warnings = false;
1136:     bool trace = false;
1137:     bool undefined_error = true;
1138:     bool x = false;
1139:     i64 arch = CPU_TYPE_ARM64;
1140:     i64 filler = 0;
1141:     i64 headerpad = 256;
1142:     i64 pagezero_size = 0;
1143:     i64 platform = PLATFORM_MACOS;
1144:     i64 stack_size = 0;
1145:     i64 thread_count = 0;
1146:     std::string bundle_loader;
1147:     std::string chroot;
1148:     std::string dependency_info;
1149:     std::string executable_path;
1150:     std::string final_output;
1151:     std::string install_name;
1152:     std::string lto_library;
1153:     std::string map;
1154:     std::string object_path_lto;
1155:     std::string oso_prefix;
1156:     std::string output = "a.out";
1157:     std::string plugin;
1158:     std::string umbrella;
1159:     std::vector<AddEmptySectionOption> add_empty_section;
1160:     std::vector<SectAlignOption> sectalign;
1161:     std::vector<SectCreateOption> sectcreate;
1162:     std::vector<std::string> U;
1163:     std::vector<std::string> add_ast_path;
1164:     std::vector<std::string> framework_paths;
1165:     std::vector<std::string> library_paths;
1166:     std::vector<std::string> mllvm;
1167:     std::vector<std::string> order_file;
1168:     std::vector<std::string> rpaths;
1169:     std::vector<std::string> syslibroot;
1170:     std::vector<std::string> u;
1171:   } arg;
1172: 
1173:   ReaderContext reader;
1174:   std::vector<std::string_view> cmdline_args;
1175:   tbb::task_group tg;
1176:   u32 output_type = MH_EXECUTE;
1177:   i64 file_priority = 10000;
1178:   std::set<std::string> missing_files; // for -dependency_info
1179: 
1180:   u8 uuid[16] = {};
1181:   bool has_error = false;
1182:   u64 tls_begin = 0;
1183:   std::string cwd = std::filesystem::current_path().string();
1184: 
1185:   LTOPlugin lto = {};
1186:   std::once_flag lto_plugin_loaded;
1187: 
1188:   tbb::concurrent_hash_map<std::string_view, Symbol<E>, HashCmp> symbol_map;
1189: 
1190:   std::unique_ptr<OutputFile<Context<E>>> output_file;

1262: template <typename E>
1263: std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &out, const InputSection<E> &sec) {
1264:   out << sec.file << "(" << sec.hdr.get_segname() << ","
1265:       << sec.hdr.get_sectname() << ")";
1266:   return out;
1267: }
1268: 
1269: template <typename E>
1270: inline std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &out, const Symbol<E> &sym) {
1271:   if (opt_demangle && sym.name.starts_with("__Z"))
1272:     out << demangle(sym.name.substr(1));
1273:   else
1274:     out << sym.name;
1275:   return out;
1276: }
1277: 
1278: template <typename E>
1279: inline Symbol<E> *get_symbol(Context<E> &ctx, std::string_view name) {
1280:   typename decltype(ctx.symbol_map)::const_accessor acc;
1281:   ctx.symbol_map.insert(acc, {name, Symbol<E>(name)});
1282:   return (Symbol<E> *)(&acc->second);
1283: }

  16: template <typename E>
  17: std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &out, const Chunk<E> &chunk) {
  18:   out << chunk.hdr.get_segname() << "," << chunk.hdr.get_sectname();

  22: template <typename T>
  23: static std::vector<u8> to_u8vec(T &data) {
  24:   std::vector<u8> buf(sizeof(T));
  25:   memcpy(buf.data(), &data, sizeof(T));
  26:   return buf;
  27: }
  28: 
  29: template <typename E>
  30: static std::vector<u8> create_pagezero_cmd(Context<E> &ctx) {
  31:   SegmentCommand<E> cmd = {};
  32:   cmd.cmd = LC_SEGMENT_64;
  33:   cmd.cmdsize = sizeof(cmd);
  34:   strcpy(cmd.segname, "__PAGEZERO");
  35:   cmd.vmsize = ctx.arg.pagezero_size;
  36:   return to_u8vec(cmd);
  37: }
  38: 
  39: template <typename E>
  40: static std::vector<u8> create_segment_cmd(Context<E> &ctx, OutputSegment<E> &seg) {
  41:   i64 nsects = 0;
  42:   for (Chunk<E> *sec : seg.chunks)
  43:     if (!sec->is_hidden)
  44:       nsects++;
  45: 
  46:   SegmentCommand<E> cmd = seg.cmd;
  47:   cmd.cmdsize = sizeof(SegmentCommand<E>) + sizeof(MachSection<E>) * nsects;
  48:   cmd.nsects = nsects;
  49: 
  50:   std::vector<u8> buf = to_u8vec(cmd);
  51:   for (Chunk<E> *sec : seg.chunks)
  52:     if (!sec->is_hidden)
  53:       append(buf, to_u8vec(sec->hdr));
  54:   return buf;
  55: }
  56: 
  57: template <typename E>
  58: static std::vector<u8> create_dyld_info_only_cmd(Context<E> &ctx) {
  59:   DyldInfoCommand cmd = {};
  60:   cmd.cmd = LC_DYLD_INFO_ONLY;
  61:   cmd.cmdsize = sizeof(cmd);
  62: 
  63:   if (ctx.rebase && ctx.rebase->hdr.size) {
  64:     cmd.rebase_off = ctx.rebase->hdr.offset;
  65:     cmd.rebase_size = ctx.rebase->hdr.size;
  66:   }
  67: 
  68:   if (ctx.bind && ctx.bind->hdr.size) {
  69:     cmd.bind_off = ctx.bind->hdr.offset;
  70:     cmd.bind_size = ctx.bind->hdr.size;
  71:   }
  72: 
  73:   if (ctx.lazy_bind && ctx.lazy_bind->hdr.size) {
  74:     cmd.lazy_bind_off = ctx.lazy_bind->hdr.offset;
  75:     cmd.lazy_bind_size = ctx.lazy_bind->hdr.size;
  76:   }
  77: 
  78:   if (ctx.export_.hdr.size) {
  79:     cmd.export_off = ctx.export_.hdr.offset;
  80:     cmd.export_size = ctx.export_.hdr.size;
  81:   }
  82:   return to_u8vec(cmd);
  83: }
  84: 
  85: template <typename E>
  86: static std::vector<u8> create_symtab_cmd(Context<E> &ctx) {
  87:   SymtabCommand cmd = {};
  88:   cmd.cmd = LC_SYMTAB;
  89:   cmd.cmdsize = sizeof(cmd);
  90:   cmd.symoff = ctx.symtab.hdr.offset;
  91:   cmd.nsyms = ctx.symtab.hdr.size / sizeof(MachSym<E>);
  92:   cmd.stroff = ctx.strtab.hdr.offset;
  93:   cmd.strsize = ctx.strtab.hdr.size;
  94:   return to_u8vec(cmd);
  95: }

  97: template <typename E>
  98: static std::vector<u8> create_dysymtab_cmd(Context<E> &ctx) {
  99:   DysymtabCommand cmd = {};
 100:   cmd.cmd = LC_DYSYMTAB;
 101:   cmd.cmdsize = sizeof(cmd);
 102:   cmd.ilocalsym = 0;
 103:   cmd.nlocalsym = ctx.symtab.globals_offset;
 104:   cmd.iextdefsym = ctx.symtab.globals_offset;
 105:   cmd.nextdefsym = ctx.symtab.undefs_offset - ctx.symtab.globals_offset;
 106:   cmd.iundefsym = ctx.symtab.undefs_offset;
 107:   cmd.nundefsym = ctx.symtab.hdr.size / sizeof(MachSym<E>) - ctx.symtab.undefs_offset;
 108:   cmd.indirectsymoff = ctx.indir_symtab.hdr.offset;
 109:   cmd.nindirectsyms  = ctx.indir_symtab.hdr.size / ctx.indir_symtab.ENTRY_SIZE;
 110:   return to_u8vec(cmd);
 111: }

 113: template <typename E>
 114: static std::vector<u8> create_dylinker_cmd(Context<E> &ctx) {
 115:   static constexpr char path[] = "/usr/lib/dyld";
 116: 
 117:   i64 size = sizeof(DylinkerCommand) + sizeof(path);
 118:   std::vector<u8> buf(align_to(size, 8));
 119: 
 120:   DylinkerCommand &cmd = *(DylinkerCommand *)buf.data();
 121:   cmd.cmd = LC_LOAD_DYLINKER;
 122:   cmd.cmdsize = buf.size();
 123:   cmd.nameoff = sizeof(cmd);
 124:   memcpy(buf.data() + sizeof(cmd), path, sizeof(path));
 125:   return buf;
 126: }

 128: template <typename E>
 129: static std::vector<u8> create_uuid_cmd(Context<E> &ctx) {
 130:   UUIDCommand cmd = {};
 131:   cmd.cmd = LC_UUID;
 132:   cmd.cmdsize = sizeof(cmd);
 133: 
 134:   assert(sizeof(cmd.uuid) == sizeof(ctx.uuid));
 135:   memcpy(cmd.uuid, ctx.uuid, sizeof(cmd.uuid));
 136:   return to_u8vec(cmd);
 137: }

 139: template <typename E>
 140: static std::vector<u8> create_build_version_cmd(Context<E> &ctx) {
 141:   i64 size = sizeof(BuildVersionCommand) + sizeof(BuildToolVersion);
 142:   std::vector<u8> buf(align_to(size, 8));
 143: 
 144:   BuildVersionCommand &cmd = *(BuildVersionCommand *)buf.data();
 145:   cmd.cmd = LC_BUILD_VERSION;
 146:   cmd.cmdsize = buf.size();
 147:   cmd.platform = ctx.arg.platform;
 148:   cmd.minos = ctx.arg.platform_min_version.encode();
 149:   cmd.sdk = ctx.arg.platform_sdk_version.encode();
 150:   cmd.ntools = 1;
 151: 
 152:   BuildToolVersion &tool = *(BuildToolVersion *)(buf.data() + sizeof(cmd));
 153:   tool.tool = TOOL_MOLD;
 154:   tool.version = parse_version(ctx, mold_version_string).encode();
 155:   return buf;
 156: }

 166: template <typename E>
 167: static std::vector<u8> create_main_cmd(Context<E> &ctx) {
 168:   EntryPointCommand cmd = {};
 169:   cmd.cmd = LC_MAIN;
 170:   cmd.cmdsize = sizeof(cmd);
 171:   cmd.entryoff = ctx.arg.entry->get_addr(ctx) - ctx.mach_hdr.hdr.addr;
 172:   cmd.stacksize = ctx.arg.stack_size;

 176: template <typename E>
 177: static std::vector<u8>
 178: create_load_dylib_cmd(Context<E> &ctx, DylibFile<E> &dylib) {
 179:   i64 size = sizeof(DylibCommand) + dylib.install_name.size() + 1; // +1 for NUL
 180:   std::vector<u8> buf(align_to(size, 8));
 181: 
 182:   auto get_type = [&] {
 183:     if (dylib.is_reexported)
 184:       return LC_REEXPORT_DYLIB;
 185:     if (dylib.is_weak)
 186:       return LC_LOAD_WEAK_DYLIB;
 187:     return LC_LOAD_DYLIB;
 188:   };
 189: 
 190:   DylibCommand &cmd = *(DylibCommand *)buf.data();
 191:   cmd.cmd = get_type();
 192:   cmd.cmdsize = buf.size();
 193:   cmd.nameoff = sizeof(cmd);
 194:   cmd.timestamp = 2;
 195:   cmd.current_version = ctx.arg.current_version.encode();
 196:   cmd.compatibility_version = ctx.arg.compatibility_version.encode();
 197:   write_string(buf.data() + sizeof(cmd), dylib.install_name);
 198:   return buf;
 199: }

 202: static std::vector<u8> create_rpath_cmd(Context<E> &ctx, std::string_view name) {
 203:   i64 size = sizeof(RpathCommand) + name.size() + 1; // +1 for NUL
 204:   std::vector<u8> buf(align_to(size, 8));
 205: 
 206:   RpathCommand &cmd = *(RpathCommand *)buf.data();
 207:   cmd.cmd = LC_RPATH;
 208:   cmd.cmdsize = buf.size();
 209:   cmd.path_off = sizeof(cmd);
 210:   write_string(buf.data() + sizeof(cmd), name);
 211:   return buf;
 212: }

 256:   i64 size = sizeof(UmbrellaCommand) + ctx.arg.umbrella.size() + 1;
 257:   std::vector<u8> buf(align_to(size, 8));
 258: 
 259:   UmbrellaCommand &cmd = *(UmbrellaCommand *)buf.data();

 261:   cmd.cmdsize = buf.size();
 262:   cmd.umbrella_off = sizeof(cmd);
 263:   write_string(buf.data() + sizeof(cmd), ctx.arg.umbrella);

 269:   i64 size = sizeof(DylibCommand) + ctx.arg.final_output.size() + 1;
 270:   std::vector<u8> buf(align_to(size, 8));

 272:   DylibCommand &cmd = *(DylibCommand *)buf.data();
 273:   cmd.cmd = LC_ID_DYLIB;

 275:   cmd.nameoff = sizeof(cmd);

 280: template <typename E>
 281: static std::vector<u8> create_code_signature_cmd(Context<E> &ctx) {
 282:   LinkEditDataCommand cmd = {};
 283:   cmd.cmd = LC_CODE_SIGNATURE;
 284:   cmd.cmdsize = sizeof(cmd);
 285:   cmd.dataoff = ctx.code_sig->hdr.offset;
 286:   cmd.datasize = ctx.code_sig->hdr.size;
 287:   return to_u8vec(cmd);
